zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Hawkins於1568年出生在英國維爾爾特洛布利其時，她的父親Thomas Hawkins20歲，母親Margaret Abbott19歲。她於1588年7月10日與John Thomas Crooke在英國維爾爾特洛布利其結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1619年在英國藍卡爾享年51歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾吉可哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Hawkins于1568年出生在英国維爾爾特洛布利其时，她的父亲Thomas Hawkins20岁，母亲Margaret Abbott19岁。她于1588年7月10日与John Thomas Crooke在英国維爾爾特洛布利其结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1619年在英国藍卡爾享年51岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾吉可哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Hawkins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Hawkin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

English: habitational name, with excrescent -s, from Hawkinge (Kent). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Heafoc or Old English heafoc ‘hawk’ + the placename forming suffix -ing. This name has been assimilated to the patronymic surname in Devon from Sir John Hawkyns (1532–95), victor against the Spanish Armada (1588), who was a member of the Devon family of Hawkins, a branch of a Kentish family from the village of Hawkinge. They held land in Plymouth as long ago as 1480.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Hawkins was born in 1568, in Trowbridge, Wiltshire, England, her father, Thomas Hawkins, was 20 and her mother, Margaret Abbott, was 19. She married John Thomas Crooke on 10 July 1588, in Trowbridge, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1619, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Kirkham, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Hawkins est née en 1568, à Trowbridge, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Hawkins, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margaret Abbott, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John Thomas Crooke le 10 juillet 1588, à Trowbridge, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1619, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Kirkham, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Hawkins 1568 in Trowbridge, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Hawkins 20 und ihre Mutter Margaret Abbott 19. Sie hat am 10. Juli 1588 in Trowbridge, Wiltshire, England John Thomas Crooke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1619 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Lancashire, England und wurde in Kirkham, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Hawkins è nata il nel 1568 nel Trowbridge, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Hawkins, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Margaret Abbott, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato John Thomas Crooke il 10 luglio 1588, nel Trowbridge, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1619, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Kirkham, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Hawkinsが1568年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアトロウブリッジで生まれた時，父Thomas Hawkinsは20歳，母Margaret Abbottは19歳であった。1588年7月10日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアトロウブリッジでJohn Thomas Crookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1619年にイギリスランカシュアイアで51歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアキルクハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Hawkins(이)가 1568년 영국 윌츠히르 트로우브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Hawkins(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Abbott(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1588년 7월 10일 영국 윌츠히르 트로우브리지에서 John Thomas Crooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1619년 영국 랭카실르에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 커카에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Hawkins nasceu em 1568, em Trowbridge, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Hawkins, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Abbott, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com John Thomas Crooke em 10 de julho de 1588, em Trowbridge, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1619, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Hawkins родилась в 1568 г. в местности троубридж, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Hawkins было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Abbott, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Thomas Crooke 10 июля 1588 г. в местности троубридж, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1619 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности кирхам, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Hawkins nació en 1568, en Trowbridge, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Hawkins, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Margaret Abbott, tenía 19 años. Se casó con John Thomas Crooke el 10 de julio de 1588, en Trowbridge, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1619, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
